# Copilot instructions — IoT DevKit (Flutter)

The single source of truth for this repository is `CLAUDE.md` in the project root.
Read and follow it before suggesting or making changes. It covers build/test commands,
architecture, state-management / i18n / UI-design-system conventions, business boundaries
that must not be touched in UI-only work, the change→test mapping, and commit style.

Do not duplicate those rules here — keeping a single guide avoids divergence.
